name: neogebra
description: Neogebra — a lightweight, non-invasive plugin framework for the GeoGebra desktop app. A desktop manager injects a proxy layer that loads plugins dynamically at startup, without modifying GeoGebra's own code.

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:proxy && npm --workspace @neogebra/desktop run build:renderer
scripts.desktop: npm run build:proxy && npm --workspace @neogebra/desktop run build:renderer && npm --workspace @neogebra/desktop run start
